code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("no input")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("no second line")?

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut pi = 0
  while pi < parts.len()
    let part = match parts.get(pi)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    pi = pi + 1
  end

  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    return Err("invalid target")
  end

  let total = nums.len()
  mut found = false
  mut ri = 0
  mut rj = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < total and not found
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < total and not found
      let vi = match nums.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      let vj = match nums.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if vi + vj == t
        found = true
        ri = i
        rj = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if found
    print("found=#{ri},#{rj}")
  else
    print("none")
  end

  Ok(())
end
